title: Vantage Versus Earthborne Rangers
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O14qr6DPo4Q

Daniel (@dungeondive) tackles the comparison many have been asking for: **Vantage versus Earthborne Rangers**. No burying the lede—Vantage wins his vote by a comfortable margin.

The key difference is fundamental. Earthborne Rangers is a 30-day campaign; Vantage is one-and-done. One delivers "adventure snacks" spread across weeks; the other serves complete meals in a couple of hours. Art direction favours Earthborne Rangers (that Miyazaki pastoral vibe is gorgeous), but variety favours Vantage decisively—Daniel's already tired of certain encounter cards after just six in-game days.

Six comparison points get examined. Your preference probably comes down to one question the video poses clearly.

----

*Campaign devotee or single-session completionist? Where do you land?*
